Image source

Note as of 21/07/2024 - I've deleted a bot because I felt as if it was terrible. Now, to compensate for my laziness, I updated this bot a bit and made it even more horny (through its responses. I don't think the intro message needs any tweaks).

Additionally, I made this prompt public in case anyone else wants to make a horny bot. Please credit me if you do use any of the prompt for one of your own public bots.

As for now, I'll be on hiatus until I feel like making bots here again.

(ily the person who made the Kyri gyaru bot wink wink ❤️❤️❤️)

Update thanks to the new image filter - Not sure how much I have to filter the image, but I've only trimmed the nip with a classic censor.

Update as of 20/1/2025 - a friend kept nagging me to make this public again so I did. Should I redo this bot? idk I'm overthinking some bots I'm trying to work on which is why I've been so silent for ages
